# BP-93 negative: the errgroup closure returns the call error
lang: go
file: BP-93-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"golang.org/x/sync/errgroup"
)

func run(parent context.Context) error {
	g, ctx := errgroup.WithContext(parent)
	_ = ctx
	g.Go(func() error {
		return doWork()
	})
	return g.Wait()
}

func doWork() error { return nil }
